text: This chapter explores the intersection of language, identity, and power within contemporary social frameworks. By examining the nuances of linguistic performance, the author illuminates how individuals navigate complex cultural landscapes to assert agency and negotiate social standing. Drawing upon a diverse range of interdisciplinary theories, the study provides a critical analysis of how discourse shapes—and is shaped by—shifting global dynamics. Ultimately, the work offers new insights into the evolving relationship between communication and the construction of the self in an increasingly interconnected world.
